title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・我が心、盛大に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Sakura Chiyono O runs, she can feel her old
self breaking apart. However, she continues
running forwards alongside her rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She leaves the scattered pieces of her past self
behind and is reborn as a new racer, embracing
what she possesses in the here and now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky showers praise on her, both for
winning the race and for overcoming her trial.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon, the two will face off as rivals at the Japan
Cup to fulfill their promise.
